name: Cheese, Bacon and Bread Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, dillweed, and lemon peel. Stir in sour cream. Mix until smooth.
2. On a floured surface, knead dough until smooth. Cover; set aside to rest.
3. Cook bacon in a 10-inch oven-safe skillet until crisp. Drain and crumble. Set aside.
4. Wipe the skillet clean with paper towels. Press the dough onto the bottom and half inch up the sides of the skillet. Sprinkle with all but 2 tablespoons of the crumbled bacon.
5. In a bowl, combine cheeses, milk, mustard, chopped green onion, and parsley. Spread mixture into the skillet.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Cool slightly. Cut into wedges and sprinkle with reserved bacon.
